title: Risk Score Results
description: Review the outputs of a calculated risk score including distribution histograms, percentile breakdowns, patient-level scores, and discrimination metrics such as C-statistic and AUC.
tips: The score distribution histogram shows how patients are stratified into risk tiers.
Use the percentile table to identify thresholds for high, medium, and low risk classifications.
C-statistic and AUC values quantify model discrimination — values above 0.75 indicate good predictive performance.
Export the patient-level score table for integration with care management workflows.
